mapper.select: select r.id, r.project_id as projectId, r.enable, r.estimated_price as estimatedPrice, r.remark, r.create_by as createBy, r.create_time as createTime, r.update_by as updateBy, r.update_time as updateTime from doc_project_add_record r where r.project_id = #{projectId} and r.del_flag = '0' order by r.create_time desc

select r.id, r.project_id as projectId, r.enable, r.estimated_price as estimatedPrice, r.remark, r.create_by as createBy, r.create_time as createTime, r.update_by as updateBy, r.update_time as updateTime from doc_project_add_record r where r.id = #{id} and r.del_flag = '0' limit 1
